docket_entries.description: MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $2,625.00 FILED BY CASTRO HOTEL, INC. AS TO DEFENDANT EVANS, TARON JAMAL ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR JUL-11-2025 AT 08:30 AM IN DEPT 506

DECLARATION RESET HEARING DATE FILED BY PLAINTIFF CASTRO HOTEL, INC.

DECLARATION OF APPEARANCE ON BEHALF OF CORPORATION PURSUANT TO CCP 116.540 (B)-(H) JOHN FALXA (OWNER/MANAGER) FILED BY PLAINTIFF CASTRO HOTEL, INC.

SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF JUL-15-2025 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF JUL-15-2025 BY VISITING JUDGE TAMILA IPEMA. APPEARANCES: PLAINTIFF CASTRO HOTEL, INC. IS PRESENT. DEFENDANT TARON JAMAL EVANS IS NOT PRESENT. CLERK: M. DE LUNA. PLAINTIFF'S EXHIBITS RETAINED. NOT REPORTED. (D506)
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF JUL-15-2025 - JUDGMENT.

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF CASTRO HOTEL, INC. RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT EVANS, TARON JAMAL $2,625.00 PRINCIPAL, $50.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $2,675.00 STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS, SEE JUDGMENT ATTACHED PLAINTIFF'S EXHIBITS RECEIVED
